transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks for calling Riverbend Health Navigation, this is Ava. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Hi, I need to reschedule my appointment with Dr. Kessler. It's currently for this Thursday.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I can help with that. Can I get your full name and date of birth to pull up the appointment?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Sure, it's Maria Delgado, born March 4th, 1985.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks, Maria. I see your appointment with Dr. Kessler this Thursday at 2:15pm. What day works better for you?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Could we do sometime next Monday, maybe in the morning?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Let me check. I have Monday at 9:30am or 11am available with Dr. Kessler.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Perfect, I've moved your appointment to Monday at 9:30am and canceled the Thursday slot. You'll get a confirmation text shortly.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Great, have a good day, Maria.
